allow: Bash(find "E:/Unity Projects/Claude Fluid Simulation" -type f -name "README*" -o -name "CLAUDE.md" -o -name ".cursorrules" -o -name "copilot-instructions.md" 2>/dev/null | head -20)

Bash(find "E:/Unity Projects/Claude Fluid Simulation" -maxdepth 2 -type f \\\( -name "*.md" -o -name "*.txt" -o -name ".cursorrules" -o -name "CLAUDE.md" \\\) 2>/dev/null | grep -v Library | grep -v Temp | grep -v Package)

Bash(cd "E:/Unity Projects/Claude Fluid Simulation" && sed -i 's/numParticles: 100000/numParticles: 500000/' Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity && grep "numParticles" Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity)

Bash(cd "E:/Unity Projects/Claude Fluid Simulation" && sed -i 's/nearPressureMultiplier: 8/nearPressureMultiplier: 18/' Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity && grep "nearPressureMultiplier\\|numParticles\\|smoothingRadius" Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity)

Bash(cd "E:/Unity Projects/Claude Fluid Simulation" && sed -i 's/numParticles: 500000/numParticles: 100000/' Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity && grep "numParticles\\|nearPressureMultiplier\\|smoothingRadius" Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity)

Bash(cd "E:/Unity Projects/Claude Fluid Simulation" && sed -i \\
  's/numParticles: 100000/numParticles: 500000/' \\
  Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity && \\
sed -i \\
  's/boundsSize: {x: 13, y: 9}/boundsSize: {x: 29, y: 20}/' \\
  Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity && \\
grep "numParticles\\|boundsSize\\|smoothingRadius\\|nearPressureMultiplier" Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity)

Bash(cd "E:/Unity Projects/Claude Fluid Simulation" && sed -i \\
  's/obstacleCentre: {x: 4.69, y: 0.7}/obstacleCentre: {x: 10.42, y: 1.56}/' \\
  Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity && \\
sed -i \\
  's/obstacleSize: {x: 0.19, y: 9.8}/obstacleSize: {x: 0.42, y: 21.8}/' \\
  Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity && \\
grep "obstacleCentre\\|obstacleSize" Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity)
Bash(cd "E:/Unity Projects/Claude Fluid Simulation" && sed -i '169s/.*/  obstacleSize: {x: 0.42, y: 21.8}/' Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity && grep "obstacleSize" Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity)

Bash(cd "E:/Unity Projects/Claude Fluid Simulation" && sed -i 's/numParticles: 500000/numParticles: 100000/' Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity && grep "numParticles\\|boundsSize" Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity)

Bash(cd "E:/Unity Projects/Claude Fluid Simulation" && sed -i 's/boundsSize: {x: 29, y: 20}/boundsSize: {x: 13, y: 9}/' Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity && grep "boundsSize\\|numParticles" Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity)

Bash(cd "E:/Unity Projects/Claude Fluid Simulation" && sed -i 's/  numParticles: 100000/  numParticles: 500000/' Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity && sed -i 's/  boundsSize: {x: 20, y: 12}/  boundsSize: {x: 45, y: 27}/' Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity && sed -i 's/  orthographic size: 10/  orthographic size: 14/' Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity)

Bash(cd "E:/Unity Projects/Claude Fluid Simulation" && sed -i 's/  numParticles: 500000/  numParticles: 1000000/' Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity && sed -i 's/  boundsSize: {x: 45, y: 27}/  boundsSize: {x: 64, y: 38}/' Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity && sed -i 's/  orthographic size: 14/  orthographic size: 20/' Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity && grep -n "numParticles\\|boundsSize\\|orthographic size" Assets/Scenes/FluidGPU_Demo.unity)

Bash(cd "E:/Unity Projects/Claude Fluid Simulation" && sed -i 's/if \(start == 0x7FFFFFFF\) continue;   \\/\\/ empty cell/uint end = _CellEnd[cellIdx];\\n        if \(start >= end\) continue;   \\/\\/ empty cell/' Assets/Shaders/FluidCompute2D.compute && sed -i 's/if \(start == 0x7FFFFFFF\) continue;   \\/\\/ empty cell/uint end = _CellEnd[cellIdx];\\n        if \(start >= end\) continue;   \\/\\/ empty cell/' Assets/Shaders/FluidCompute2D.compute)
